# Page 1^page=1
Think digital, add value

# Page 2^page=2
About Neoception

# Page 3^page=3
NEOCEPTION Solution Provider Member Development Partner of the DPP4.0 Reference Architecture Reduce Complexity. Increase Productivity. Neoception GmbH is a technology leader in the field of Digital Twins (AAS). As a spin-off of the Pepperl+Fuchs Group founded in 2017, we combine deep industry and process understanding with modern software development – ​​and help companies use digital technologies economically and productively. We don’t just supply software – we accompany companies as partners: curious and innovative, solution-oriented and on equal terms.

# Page 4^page=4
Market requirements and opportunities 1

# Page 5^page=5
The problem

ERP PIM Mediabase MES Digital service center Digital regulations There are 23 other use cases and applications in the pipeline … Any other database or system Any other use case DIGITAL TRANSFORMATION … and why it often gets stuck

Stop new projects! This is not economical! … and why it often gets stuck Stop new projects! I cannot handle those projects anymore! DIGITAL TRANSFORMATION

The issue There is more than just this one story High investments (50-200TEUR) apply for nearly any use-case internal processes​ customer services and offerings​ (value network) Partner expectations Upcoming regulatory requirements​

# Page 9^page=9
Challenge There needs to be a way to enable digital transformation in an economical and user-friendly way.

# Page 10^page=10
The solution

# Page 11^page=11
ERP PIM Mediabase MES Any other database or system Digital service center Digital regulations Any other use case DIGITAL TRANSFORMATION WITH NEOCEPTION Add value by being able to steer information flow, modeling and standardization

# Page 12^page=12
We can digitalize economically by eliminating major cost sinks! Great, now I am available for other valuable tasks in the company! DIGITAL TRANSFORMATION WITH NEOCEPTION Add value by being able to steer information flow, modeling and standardization We can finally realize a lot more projects that are worth doing with low risk IT Departments & Project teams CEO

# Page 13^page=13
Market Developments Digital Product Passport: - First products: Battery Pass → Mandatory from 02/2027 - Major industries commited to AAS as preferred technology to implement DPP Paperless Product Documentation in legal process at EU (Omnibus IV) Companies like BASF, EVONIK, KION Group,… require the technical documentation in a digital way (VDI2770) - SAP launched their AAS import interface in 05/ 2025 - EPLAN promotes their AAS import interface on SPS 2025 - … Internal Processes Customer Services Interoperability Regulatory Requirements

# Page 14^page=14
Market Developments Imagine, there is a „place“, where you can find all information about the object which is in front of you: The Asset Administration Shell (AAS) ▪ Global open standard (IEC 63728) ▪ Format ▪ Interface (API, export, …) ▪ Designed for interoperability (due to its integrated semantics) ▪ Provides several standardized templates ▪ Technical Documentation ▪ Material Compliance ▪ Automated Material Creation ▪ … ▪ Considered for latest regulatory (DPP, Data Act,…)

# Page 15^page=15
Architecture & Integration 2

# Page 16^page=16
2. Select the data model template based on context data 3. Map standardized property to proprietary location 4. Request the data from the live systems 5. Build AAS based on template and fill with extracted and transformed data Neoception AAS AUTOMATION ON DEMAND 1. Request an AAS and (optional) provide context data (serialn°, role, …) Application Modeling Standardization Mapping Data provisioning Managed via UI based configuration

# Page 18^page=18
„To-Dos“ – How to setup and operate an AAS ecosystem Deployment on company infrastructure Integration of data sources (Connectors) Configuration of Automation/Models /Templates/… One time per instance One time per data source One time per use case or change Scalable and automated creation and provisioning of Asset Administration Shells (AAS) WHY? WHAT? WHEN? WHO? IT (Infrastructure) IT or Service (Enterprise systems) Content admin (role, 1..n persons)

# Page 19^page=19
Example architecture

# Page 20^page=20
General information Neoception Product 3

# Page 21^page=21
What are the key functionalities?

# Page 22^page=22
WHAT ARE THE KEY FUNCTIONALITIES? - Integration of Proprietary Data Sources - Standardization, Mapping, and Modeling of Data into the AAS - Contextual Rule Creation - Dynamic and on-demand AAS Creation - Backoffice UI for configuration - Standardized Interfaces - On-board Applications

# Page 23^page=23
What do I get?

# Page 24^page=24
WHAT DO I GET? Neoception® Digital Twin Infrastructure - Available as a Software product via Subscription Licence (monthly fee) - Hosted and operated within your IT infrastructure - Supported by relevant product and interface documentation for a self-responsible integration - Benefits from professional Software Product development - Expandable with consulting, integration & support services

# Page 25^page=25
WHAT ARE THE BENEFITS OF IT BEING A SOFTWARE PRODUCT? Security & Compliance: - Continuous CVE and security monitoring - Access management - Backup and restore functionality - Deployed in customer infrastructure – protected by company policies - External independence - only “mandatory” connections to external systems: Automated license renewal and update provisioning Integrated Update Functionality: - Build-in provisioning and installation of software updates without the mandatory need for IT-support "Common Core": - One maintained software core shared with each instance - Continuous development of new features and functionalities - Faster reaction time for critical fixes

# Page 26^page=26
What do I need to do when the DPP comes around?

# Page 27^page=27
WHAT DO I NEED TO DO WHEN THE DPP AND DATASPACES COME AROUND? ✓ You can by configuration model any requirement fast and easy ✓ There is a snapshot application already available and basically providing today, what tomorrow is necessary ✓ The product is under continuous development and the DPP is a requirement all customers get ✓ The best preparation today to comply with the DPP tomorrow

Potential Roadmap

# Page 30^page=30
REFRENZEN u.v.m. (obligen der Vertraulichkeit) PARTNER

# Page 31^page=31
Uwe Richter Head of Innovation Fab InPro at Ziehl-Abegg CUSTOMER STATEMENTS With the help of Neoception, our innovative idea of ​​the “Digital Product Twin” has now been realized. The original joint concept idea is now part of the software product, the Neoception ® Digital Twin Infrastructure. A special highlight for us as users of the solution is the easy scalability and configuration options to meet our own requirements. The close and innovative teamwork within the mixed project team resulted in an extremely flexible and cyber-secure overall architecture for the implementation of the Asset Administration Shell. Together with Neoception, we are very proud to be one of the first companies in the world with a productive Asset Administration Shell solution. At Wago, wefacedthechallengeof bringing data from different sources with varying designations into a standardizedformat whilegenerating eCLASSdata and theDigital Product Passport (DPP). Thanks to Neoception‘s expertiseand tailored solutions, wewereableto successfullytacklethis complex task. Our collaboration with Neoception was extremlyefficient and professional. Their deep knowledgein data integration and abilityto developcustomizedsolutions significantlysimplifiedthe entireprocess. By implementing their solution, wewill harmonizeour data sources and establish an unified data foundation that will beindispensable for future projects. Simone Brinkmann-Tewes Head of Smart Data Engineering bei WAGO GmbH & Co. KG
